briefing_zh:
今天 AI 研究领域的焦点集中在**多奖励强化学习**和**交互式 Agent**两大方向。**DVAO**（动态方差自适应优化）在数学推理任务上同时实现 42.19% 准确率和 99.91% 长度合规，展示了多目标 RL 的工程化突破。**Foundation Protocol** 提出了 agentic society 的协调层协议，试图为多 agent 系统定义通信标准，这是基础设施层面的重要探索。

视觉与 3D 方向，**TriSplat** 实现了从稀疏无位姿图像直接前馈重建三角网格场景，速度比现有方法快数个量级。**Macaron-A2UI** 则探索了个人 Agent 的生成式 UI，让 agent 能动态生成适配任务的界面。

开源社区方面，**FigMirror** 和 **DeepSeek-GUI** 本周快速积累星标，前者让 AI 自动复现论文图表风格，后者为 DeepSeek 模型提供桌面 agent 工作空间。**ai-memory** 项目直击 coding agent 的长期记忆痛点，提供跨 agent 的记忆共享方案。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research landscape centers on **multi-reward reinforcement learning** and **interactive agents**. **DVAO** (Dynamic Variance-Adaptive Optimization) achieves 42.19% accuracy with 99.91% length compliance on math reasoning, demonstrating engineering breakthroughs in multi-objective RL. **Foundation Protocol** proposes a coordination layer for agentic society, attempting to define communication standards for multi-agent systems — a critical infrastructure exploration.

In vision and 3D, **TriSplat** enables feed-forward 3D scene reconstruction from sparse unposed images into triangle meshes, orders of magnitude faster than prior methods. **Macaron-A2UI** explores generative UI for personal agents, dynamically creating task-appropriate interfaces.

In open source, **FigMirror** and **DeepSeek-GUI** rapidly gained stars this week — the former automates paper figure style replication, the latter provides a desktop agent workspace for DeepSeek models. **ai-memory** addresses the long-term memory pain point for coding agents with cross-agent memory sharing.
viral_analysis_zh: **FigMirror** 最可能成为爆款——它解决了研究者画图时「想要某篇论文的风格但不会配色」的普遍痛点，使用门槛极低（上传数据+选风格），视觉效果对比强烈适合社交媒体传播。类似 tools-for-researchers 的定位历来容易出圈。
viral_analysis_en: **FigMirror** is most likely to go viral — it solves the universal pain point of researchers wanting a specific paper's figure style but lacking design skills. Low barrier to use (upload data + pick style) and strong visual before/after comparisons make it perfect for social media. Research-tooling projects in this niche consistently break out.

huggingface_papers.title: DVAO: Dynamic Variance-adaptive Advantage Optimization for Multi-reward Reinforcement Learning
huggingface_papers.tldr: DVAO introduces dynamic variance-adaptive advantage weighting for multi-reward RL, achieving 42.19% math accuracy and 99.91% length compliance with Qwen3-4B-Base. It decouples conflicting reward signals without manual tuning.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: DVAO 提出动态方差自适应优势加权用于多奖励 RL，在 Qwen3-4B-Base 上实现 42.19% 数学准确率和 99.91% 长度合规。无需手动调参即可解耦冲突的奖励信号。
huggingface_papers.authors: Guochao Jiang, Jingyi Song, Guofeng Quan

huggingface_papers.title: WBench: A Comprehensive Multi-turn Benchmark for Interactive Video World Model Evaluation
huggingface_papers.tldr: WBench is a multi-turn benchmark for interactive video world models, evaluating 20 models across quality, interaction adherence, and physical plausibility. Finds multi-turn navigation degradation as the key bottleneck.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: WBench 是交互式视频世界模型的多轮评测基准，从质量、交互遵循和物理合理性 5 个维度评估 20 个模型，发现多轮导航退化是关键瓶颈。
huggingface_papers.authors: Kaining Ying, Hengrui Hu, Siyu Ren

huggingface_papers.title: Macaron-A2UI: A Model for Generative UI in Personal Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: Macaron-A2UI enables personal agents to generate custom UIs on-the-fly for each task, rather than relying on fixed app interfaces. Combines LLM planning with UI generation for seamless human-agent interaction.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Macaron-A2UI 让个人 Agent 能为每个任务动态生成自定义 UI，而非依赖固定应用界面。结合 LLM 规划与 UI 生成实现无缝人机交互。
huggingface_papers.authors: Fancy Kong, Congjie Zheng, Murphy Zhuang

huggingface_papers.title: Foundation Protocol: A Coordination Layer for Agentic Society
huggingface_papers.tldr: Foundation Protocol defines a coordination layer for multi-agent societies — addressing identity, communication, and trust between autonomous agents. Aims to become a standard for agent interoperability.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Foundation Protocol 为多 agent 社会定义协调层，解决自主 agent 间的身份、通信和信任问题，目标成为 agent 互操作的标准协议。
huggingface_papers.authors: Bang Liu, Yongfeng Gu, Jiayi Zhang

huggingface_papers.title: TriSplat: Simulation-Ready Feed-Forward 3D Scene Reconstruction
huggingface_papers.tldr: TriSplat reconstructs simulation-ready 3D scenes from sparse unposed images in a single feed-forward pass, producing oriented triangle meshes orders of magnitude faster than optimization-based methods.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: TriSplat 从稀疏无位姿图像单次前馈重建可仿真 3D 场景，生成有向三角网格，速度比优化方法快数个量级。
huggingface_papers.authors: Weijie Wang, Zimu Li, Jinchuan Shi

alphaxiv_papers.title: CUA-GYM: An RLVR Training Data Pipeline for Computer-Use Agents
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: CUA-GYM provides 32,112 RLVR training tasks across 110 environments for computer-use agents, improving OSWorld and WebArena scores through scalable reward-verified data generation.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: CUA-GYM 为计算机使用 Agent 提供跨 110 个环境的 32,112 个 RLVR 训练任务，通过可扩展的奖励验证数据生成提升 OSWorld 和 WebArena 分数。

alphaxiv_papers.title: AlphaProof Nexus: LLM + Lean for Research-Level Mathematics
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google DeepMind's AlphaProof Nexus combines LLMs with the Lean proof assistant to autonomously resolve open research-level math conjectures with mechanically verifiable proofs.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google DeepMind 的 AlphaProof Nexus 将 LLM 与 Lean 证明助手结合，自主解决开放研究级数学猜想并给出机械可验证证明。

alphaxiv_papers.title: LLM Sleep: Offline Memory Consolidation via Iterative Fast-Weight Updates
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: LLM Sleep introduces offline memory consolidation inspired by biological sleep, using iterative fast-weight updates for deeper reasoning over long contexts with low wake-time latency.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: LLM Sleep 借鉴生物睡眠机制引入离线记忆巩固，通过迭代快速权重更新实现长上下文深度推理，保持低唤醒延迟。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Shannon Scaling Law: Modeling LLM Training as Noisy-Channel Transmission
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: ByteDance/UVA/Berkeley model LLM training as noisy-channel information transmission, achieving R²=0.9824 and predicting U-shaped loss curves across noise, SFT, and quantization scenarios.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: ByteDance/UVA/Berkeley 将 LLM 训练建模为噪声信道传输，R²=0.9824，可预测噪声、SFT 和量化场景下的 U 型损失曲线。

alphaxiv_papers.title: MOBILEGYM: Browser-Hosted Mobile GUI Agent Simulation
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: MOBILEGYM provides browser-hosted mobile GUI simulation with JSON state for scalable online RL training of mobile agents, achieving 95.1% retained gain on real device transfer.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: MOBILEGYM 提供基于浏览器的手机 GUI 仿真环境，支持可扩展在线 RL 训练，在真实设备迁移上保持 95.1% 的性能增益。

github_repos.name: VILA-Lab/FigMirror
github_repos.tldr: AI agent that automatically replicates any paper's figure style for your own data — upload CSV/plot + reference figure, get publication-ready charts matching the visual language.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI agent 自动复现任意论文的图表风格——上传数据和参考图，生成匹配视觉语言的出版级图表。

github_repos.name: XingYu-Zhong/DeepSeek-GUI
github_repos.tldr: Desktop AI agent workspace for DeepSeek models with Code mode (autonomous coding) and Claw mode (interactive tool use) built into a native app.
github_repos.tldr_zh: DeepSeek 模型的桌面 AI agent 工作空间，内置 Code 模式（自主编码）和 Claw 模式（交互式工具使用）。

github_repos.name: study8677/awesome-architecture
github_repos.tldr: Curated architecture maps covering 21 system design patterns including AI gateway, RAG pipelines, and agent orchestration — visual learning for software architects.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 精选 21 张系统设计架构图，涵盖 AI 网关、RAG 管道和 agent 编排——面向软件架构师的可视化学习资源。

github_repos.name: akitaonrails/ai-memory
github_repos.tldr: Rust-based long-term memory solution for coding agent CLIs, enabling memory persistence and handoff between different agent tools (Cursor, Claude Code, etc.).
github_repos.tldr_zh: 基于 Rust 的 coding agent 长期记忆方案，支持跨不同 agent 工具（Cursor、Claude Code 等）的记忆持久化和交接。

github_repos.name: bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course
github_repos.tldr: Skeleton course on designing, building, and operating production AI agent systems — uses agents to teach agent development, with hands-on projects.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 设计、构建和运维生产级 AI agent 系统的骨架课程——用 agent 教 agent 开发，包含实战项目。

hackernews.title: DeepSWE: A contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents
hackernews.tldr: DeepSWE is a contamination-free benchmark for evaluating coding agents on long-horizon tasks, ensuring no test leakage from training data.
hackernews.tldr_zh: DeepSWE 是评估 coding agent 长周期任务的无污染基准，确保训练数据无测试泄漏。

hackernews.title: Show HN: MCPs aren't enough, give Codex/Claude accurate memory of everything
hackernews.tldr: Timeglass gives Codex/Claude accurate persistent memory of everything in your codebase — goes beyond MCPs by maintaining full project context across sessions.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Timeglass 为 Codex/Claude 提供代码库全量精确持久记忆，超越 MCP 实现跨会话完整项目上下文。

hackernews.title: AI Gurus Are Charging Wall Street Banks $25,000 a Day
hackernews.tldr: Bloomberg reports AI consultants charging Wall Street banks $25K/day to guide their agentic AI transformation — signals massive enterprise demand for agent expertise.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Bloomberg 报道 AI 顾问向华尔街银行收取每天 2.5 万美元指导 agentic AI 转型——反映企业对 agent 专业知识的巨大需求。

hackernews.title: Agentic Patterns
hackernews.tldr: Comprehensive analysis of agentic design patterns — planning, reflection, tool use, and multi-agent collaboration — with implementation guidance.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Agentic 设计模式全面分析——规划、反思、工具使用和多 agent 协作——附实现指南。

hackernews.title: Show HN: I built a RAG and knowledge graph agent that runs locally
hackernews.tldr: Show HN: Local RAG + knowledge graph agent combining retrieval-augmented generation with graph-based reasoning for private document Q&A.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Show HN：本地 RAG + 知识图谱 agent，结合检索增强生成与图推理实现私有文档问答。
